name: harnet
title: Self-supervised Learning for Human Activity Recognition Using 700,000 Person-days of Wearable Data

weights.note: Released frozen: a pretrained ResNet feature_extractor + an UNTRAINED EvaClassifier head. We fit the shared 2-layer probe on our 93-way global training vocabulary for the zero-shot ConSE bridge.

input_contract.note: harnet5 native input is 3 x 150 (5 s @ 30 Hz). Accelerometer only; gravity RETAINED; no per-window standardization. harnet10 (300) does not fit our <=6 s eval grids without >=4 s of padding, so harnet5 is used (mirrors the working legacy adapter).

note: Released frozen: a pretrained ResNet feature_extractor + an UNTRAINED EvaClassifier head. We fit the shared 2-layer probe on our 93-way global training vocabulary for the zero-shot ConSE bridge. NOTE: this is the official HARNet-5 release (5 s, 512-d, ~4.2M params), NOT the paper's headline 10 s / 1024-d / ~10M configuration, and our global-vocab probe + ConSE is a STANDARDIZED CONTROL, not a reproduction of the paper's published downstream numbers.
